full_text:
Tumor tissue was cut and dissociated using Dispase. For 9.7 mL of DMEM/F12, we used 200 uL Dispase, and 100 uL DNAse. Incubated in the oven for 35 min; RBC lysis buffer 4 mL + 20 mL of medium. After centrifuge, we resuspended cells in 3 mL medium, diluted 1:10 and counted cells.

Dispase dissociated cells:

Cell count/ml 1):

total: 1.52 E6

live: 6.61 E5

viability: 43.5 %

size: 10 um

Cell count /ml 2):

total: 1.8 E6

live: 5.79 E5

viability: 32.2 %

size: 9.1 um

Total cell count: 49.8 E6

Total volume: 3 mL

Overall # of cells in 3 mL was 49.8 E6.

We added 5 mL of medium, centrifuged for 5 min. Removed SN, and added 3 mL of Stem Cell Banker. Added 1 mL of cells with Stem Cell Banker into each of 3 cryovials, and froze at -80 (15.04.2024). Each cryovial contains 16.6 E6 cells.
